strategy: He takes +5% from Death and resists Life 73%. Hit with Death or a prism.
He periodically uses his Natural Attack, then becomes Pacified and untargetable for 3 rounds. You cannot damage him during that window, so bank blades and hit the moment he is targetable again.
Blades cast on ANOTHER wizard get downgraded to a half-value Balanceblade, so blade the hitter directly (or keep blades on yourself as the solo hitter) rather than passing them.
Watch for his 'Get ready, Angel' shout; the next round the Angel casts Mass Sacred Charge (840 absorb). His Lifeblade and the Angel's Absorb are Aegis-protected.
Blade up during his untargetable window, then unload a Death hit as soon as he can be targeted.
cheatNotes: Late arrival gets Infection plus an Entangle from the Angel. Zone in on time.
He periodically Natural Attacks, then goes Pacified and untargetable for 3 rounds. Bank your setup and hit the instant he is targetable again.
A blade cast on another wizard becomes a half-value Balanceblade. Blade the hitter directly; do not pass blades.
For Elemental and Spirit blades, only the first of the three gets downgraded, a partial workaround.
When he shouts 'Get ready, Angel,' the Angel casts Mass Sacred Charge next round. Expect an 840 team absorb to appear.
That Mass Sacred Charge (840) lands as a team shield. Hit hard enough to punch through it, or strip it first.
